question: Will Russia gain more territory than it loses in May 2026?
reason: Recent reports indicate Russian forces have lost territory in April and May 2026.
evidence: In April 2026, Russian forces recorded a net loss of 116 square kilometers of Ukrainian territory, marking the first such loss since August 2024. ([rubryka.com](https://rubryka.com/en/2026/05/03/minus-116-kv-km-za-misyats-zgidno-z-novym-zvitom-isw-dynamika-frontu-zminyuyetsya-na-koryst-ukrayiny/?utm_source=openai))

Between April 21 and May 19, 2026, Russian forces lost a net 69 square miles of Ukrainian territory. ([russiamatters.org](https://www.russiamatters.org/news/russia-ukraine-war-report-card/russia-ukraine-war-report-card-may-20-2026?utm_source=openai))

As of May 20, 2026, Russian forces had a net loss of 69 square miles of Ukrainian territory over the previous four weeks. ([russiamatters.org](https://www.russiamatters.org/news/russia-ukraine-war-report-card/russia-ukraine-war-report-card-may-20-2026?utm_source=openai))
